name: Industrial Enterprises of America, Inc.
summary: Industrial Enterprises of America, Inc., an automotive aftermarket supplier, sells anti-freeze, auto fluids, charcoal fluids, and other additives and chemicals in the United States. The company, through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells packaged refrigerants for the automotive and dusting markets; markets and distributes a line of automotive aftermarket chemicals to the retail, wholesale, value chains, and private labeling markets; and manufactures liquid and aerosol products. In addition, it supplies automotive and chemical products, including engine oils, transmission oils, washer solvents, brake fluids, and gasoline additives. Industrial Enterprises of America, formerly known as Advanced Bio/Chem, Inc., was founded in 1974 and is based in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. On May 1, 2009, Industrial Enterprises of America, Inc. filed a voluntary petition for reorganization under Chapter 11 in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the District of Delaware, Delaware. It is in joint administration with Pitt Penn Holding Company, Inc.
